---
title: "TeachingSampling v2.0.1 now on CRAN"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2011-04-04"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
---

The latest version of the TeachingSampling package is now available for download. Discover the newest features in the package!!!

[Download Now](http://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/TeachingSampling/index.html)
